summary: The package supports a real but bounded orchestration mechanism claim, while training-scale and availability claims remain non-mechanistic and should stay explicitly limited.

bounded_claims.claim_text: Kimi K2.5 is a native multimodal model continued-pretrained on approximately 15 trillion mixed visual and text tokens.
bounded_claims.bounds: The evidence supports a training-scale and modality description only; it does not justify a causal claim that this pretraining mix caused the downstream agent performance reported elsewhere in the package.

bounded_claims.claim_text: K2.5 Agent Swarm is beta on Kimi.com with free credits available to high-tier paid users.
bounded_claims.bounds: This is an access and availability bound, not a causal mechanism; it supports only a limited beta-release claim and should not be read as evidence of broad public readiness or mature deployment.
